case_title: COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE,A CALIF. CORP. vs. JACKSON, JAMES

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE,A CALIF. CORP.
